stories.headline: New HSBC Report Reveals Gap in Addressing Women's Financial Goals
stories.summary:
Racquel Oden, HSBC head of international wealth and private banking, said that while women have financial literacy, many feel that they don't have the fluency to make the right decisions about their finances by themselves. 
Oden, who joined the show alongside Bloomberg senior editor Claire Obusan, broke down a new report from HSBC that revealed women feel that traditional financial advice doesn't address the complexity of their financial goals.
